description: Zoho provides business software including customer relationship management and other productivity applications. The zoho.in domain represents Zoho's regional site and links to the same Zoho CRM developer platform and AI-agent features as its global site.
summary: zoho.in exposes documented Zoho CRM developer surfaces including a REST API, a GraphQL API, and a CLI; both APIs use Zoho OAuth bearer tokens, while the CLI auth mechanics were not confirmed from the scraped docs.
